Defense News Global

Armenia issues tender for 155mm artillery systems

Defense News Staff · 19 June 2026

Armenia has issued a tender for the procurement of 155mm howitzers as it modernises its artillery forces. The requirement is understood to cover both towed and mounted gun systems, with several European and Asian manufacturers expected to compete.

The move comes amid a broader artillery modernisation across the region. Analysts say the tender could attract bids involving systems such as the CAESAR and ATMOS 2000.

No contract value has been disclosed. Responses are expected later this year.
